"<html lang=\"en\" style=\"background-color: #e2e8f0;\"><head>\n    <meta charset=\"UTF-8\">\n    <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no, viewport-fit=cover\">\n    <title>Duna Networks Hub</title>\n    <link href=\"https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800&amp;display=swap\" rel=\"stylesheet\">\n    \n    <script src=\"https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/8.10.1/firebase-app.js\"></script>\n    <script src=\"https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/8.10.1/firebase-database.js\"></script>\n\n    <script>\n        (function() {\n            try {\n                if (localStorage.getItem('dashboard_theme') === 'dark') {\n                    document.documentElement.classList.add('dark-mode');\n                    document.documentElement.style.backgroundColor = '#0f172a';\n                }\n            } catch(e) {}\n        })();\n    </script>\n    <link rel=\"stylesheet\" href=\"./css/styles.css\">\n</head>\n<body>\n\n    <div id=\"toast-container\"></div>\n\n    <div id=\"loader-overlay\" style=\"display: flex; opacity: 1;\">\n        <div class=\"spinner\"></div>\n        <div id=\"loader-text\">Connecting Central Database Sync...</div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- Image Cropper Modal -->\n    <div id=\"crop-modal\" class=\"modal-overlay\" style=\"z-index: 10005;\">\n        <div class=\"modal-content\">\n            <div class=\"modal-header\">\n                <h2>Adjust Profile Picture</h2>\n                <button class=\"modal-close\" onclick=\"closeModal('crop-modal')\">✕</button>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"modal-body\" style=\"padding: 24px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; align-items: center;\">\n                <p style=\"font-size:0.85rem; color:var(--text-light); margin:0; text-align:center;\">Drag image to pan. Use slider to zoom.</p>\n                <canvas id=\"crop-canvas\" width=\"300\" height=\"300\"></canvas>\n                <input type=\"range\" id=\"crop-zoom\" style=\"width: 100%;\">\n                <button class=\"btn-sync\" onclick=\"applyCrop()\">Apply Crop &amp; Save</button>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- Group Creation Modal -->\n    <div id=\"group-create-modal\" class=\"modal-overlay\" style=\"z-index: 10003;\">\n        <div class=\"modal-content\" style=\"max-width: 400px;\">\n            <div class=\"modal-header\">\n                <h2>👥 Create Group Chat</h2>\n                <button class=\"modal-close\" onclick=\"closeModal('group-create-modal')\">✕</button>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"modal-body\" style=\"padding: 20px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px;\">\n                <div class=\"input-group\">\n                    <label>Group Name</label>\n                    <input type=\"text\" id=\"gc-name\" placeholder=\"e.g. Operations Team\">\n                </div>\n                <div class=\"input-group\">\n                    <label>Group Photo</label>\n                    <div style=\"display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: center;\">\n                        <img id=\"gc-photo-preview\" src=\"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1522071820081-009f0129c71c?q=80&amp;w=150&amp;auto=format&amp;fit=crop\" style=\"width: 50px; height: 50px; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover;\">\n                        <input type=\"file\" id=\"gc-photo-file\" accept=\"image/*\" onchange=\"convertImage('gc-photo-file', 'gc-photo-base64', 'gc-photo-preview')\" style=\"flex: 1;\">\n                        <input type=\"hidden\" id=\"gc-photo-base64\">\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n                <div class=\"input-group\">\n                    <label>Select Members</label>\n                    <div id=\"gc-members-list\" style=\"max-height: 150px; overflow-y: auto; border: 1px solid var(--input-border); border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px; background: var(--input-bg);\"></div>\n                </div>\n                <button class=\"btn-sync\" onclick=\"confirmCreateGroup()\">Create Group</button>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- Chat List Window -->\n    <div id=\"chat-list-modal\" class=\"floating-panel\">\n        <div class=\"modal-header\" id=\"chat-list-drag-handle\" style=\"cursor: move;\">\n            <h2 style=\"pointer-events: none;\">💬 Direct Messages</h2>\n            <button id=\"create-group-btn\" onclick=\"openGroupCreateModal()\" style=\"background: var(--primary); color: white; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px 12px; font-weight: bold; font-size: 0.8rem; cursor: pointer; display: none;\">+ Group</button>\n            <button class=\"modal-close\" onclick=\"closeFloatingModal('chat-list-modal')\">✕</button>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"modal-body\" id=\"chat-list-container\" style=\"background: var(--bg-body);\"></div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- Chat Room Window -->\n    <div id=\"chat-room-modal\" class=\"floating-window\">\n        <div class=\"modal-header\" id=\"chat-drag-handle\" style=\"cursor: move; background: var(--card-bg);\">\n            <div style=\"display:flex; align-items:center; gap: 10px; pointer-events: none;\">\n                <h2 id=\"chat-room-title\">💬 Chat</h2>\n                <button id=\"chat-group-delete-btn\" style=\"pointer-events: auto; display:none; background:var(--danger); color:white; border:none; border-radius:6px; padding:4px 8px; font-weight:bold; font-size:0.75rem; cursor:pointer;\" onclick=\"deleteCurrentGroup()\">🗑️ Delete</button>\n            </div>\n            <button class=\"modal-close\" onclick=\"closeFloatingModal('chat-room-modal')\">✕</button>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"modal-body chat-container\" style=\"flex: 1;\">\n            <div class=\"chat-messages\" id=\"chat-messages-container\"></div>\n            <div class=\"chat-input-wrapper\">\n                <input type=\"text\" id=\"chat-input-text\" placeholder=\"Type a message...\" onkeydown=\"if(event.key === 'Enter') { event.preventDefault(); sendChatMessage(); return false; }\">\n                <button type=\"button\" onclick=\"sendChatMessage()\">➔</button>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- Other Modals -->\n    <div id=\"monthly-modal\" class=\"modal-overlay\">\n        <div class=\"modal-content\">\n            <div class=\"modal-header\">\n                <h2>Shift History</h2>\n                <button class=\"modal-close\" onclick=\"closeModal('monthly-modal')\">✕</button>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"modal-body\">\n                <table class=\"shifts-table\">\n                    <thead><tr><th>Date</th><th>Name</th><th>Shift</th><th>Status</th></tr></thead>\n                    <tbody id=\"shifts-tbody\"></tbody>\n                </table>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <div id=\"schedule-modal\" class=\"modal-overlay\">\n        <div class=\"modal-content\">\n            <div class=\"modal-header\">\n                <h2 id=\"schedule-header-text\">Master Schedule</h2>\n                <button class=\"modal-close\" onclick=\"closeModal('schedule-modal')\">✕</button>\n            </div>\n            \n            <div class=\"modal-filter\">\n                <div class=\"filter-row\">\n                    <label>FILTER BY MONTH/YEAR:</label>\n                    <select id=\"schedule-month-filter\" onchange=\"handleScheduleFilterChange()\" style=\"width: auto; min-width: 120px;\">\n                        <option value=\"JAN\">January</option><option value=\"FEB\">February</option><option value=\"MAR\">March</option>\n                        <option value=\"APR\">April</option><option value=\"MAY\">May</option><option value=\"JUN\">June</option>\n                        <option value=\"JUL\">July</option><option value=\"AUG\">August</option><option value=\"SEP\">September</option>\n                        <option value=\"OCT\">October</option><option value=\"NOV\">November</option><option value=\"DEC\">December</option>\n                    </select>\n                    <select id=\"schedule-year-filter\" onchange=\"handleScheduleFilterChange()\" style=\"width: auto; min-width: 90px;\">\n                        <option value=\"2024\">2024</option><option value=\"2025\">2025</option><option value=\"2026\">2026</option><option value=\"2027\">2027</option>\n                    </select>\n                </div>\n                <div class=\"filter-row\" id=\"admin-group-filter-container\" style=\"display:none;\">\n                    <label>FILTER BY GROUP (LOCATION):</label>\n                    <select id=\"schedule-group-filter\" onchange=\"handleScheduleGroupFilterChange()\">\n                        <option value=\"\">-- All Locations --</option>\n                    </select>\n                </div>\n                <div class=\"filter-row\" id=\"schedule-name-filter-row\">\n                    <label>FILTER BY NAME:</label>\n                    <select id=\"schedule-name-filter\" onchange=\"handleScheduleFilterChange()\">\n                        <option value=\"\">-- All Employees --</option>\n                    </select>\n                    <button id=\"download-schedule-btn\" style=\"width: auto; padding: 10px 16px; display: none; background: var(--primary); color: white; border: none; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: bold; border-radius: 8px;\" onclick=\"downloadScheduleJPG()\">⬇️ Download JPG</button>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n\n            <div class=\"modal-tabs\" id=\"schedule-tabs\">\n                <div class=\"modal-tab active\" id=\"tab-table\" onclick=\"switchTab('table')\">Table View</div>\n                <div class=\"modal-tab\" id=\"tab-calendar\" onclick=\"switchTab('calendar')\">Calendar View</div>\n            </div>\n\n            <div class=\"modal-body\" id=\"modal-body-container\">\n                <table class=\"shifts-table\" id=\"view-table\"><thead id=\"schedule-thead\"></thead><tbody id=\"schedule-tbody\"></tbody></table>\n                <div class=\"calendar-wrapper\" id=\"view-calendar\"><div class=\"calendar-grid\" id=\"calendar-grid-container\"></div></div>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <div id=\"notice-modal\" class=\"modal-overlay\">\n        <div class=\"modal-content\" style=\"max-width: 600px;\">\n            <div class=\"modal-header\">\n                <h2>📢 Notice Board</h2>\n                <button class=\"modal-close\" onclick=\"closeModal('notice-modal')\">✕</button>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"modal-body\" id=\"notice-body\"></div>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <div id=\"directory-modal\" class=\"modal-overlay\">\n        <div class=\"modal-content\">\n            <div class=\"modal-header\">\n                <h2>👥 Employee Directory</h2>\n                <button class=\"modal-close\" onclick=\"closeModal('directory-modal')\">✕</button>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"modal-filter\" style=\"border-bottom: 1px solid var(--card-border); display: flex; flex-direction: row; gap: 10px; align-items: center;\">\n                <input type=\"text\" id=\"directory-search\" placeholder=\"Search by name or role...\" onkeyup=\"filterDirectory()\" style=\"flex: 1; padding: 12px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid var(--input-border);\">\n                <select id=\"directory-group-filter\" onchange=\"filterDirectory()\" style=\"display:none; padding: 12px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid var(--input-border); min-width: 150px;\">\n                    <option value=\"\">All Locations</option>\n                </select>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"modal-body\">\n                <div class=\"directory-grid\" id=\"directory-container\"></div>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <div id=\"employee-profile-modal\" class=\"modal-overlay\">\n        <div class=\"modal-content\" style=\"max-width: 600px;\">\n            <div class=\"modal-header\">\n                <h2>Profile Overview</h2>\n                <button class=\"modal-close\" onclick=\"closeModal('employee-profile-modal')\">✕</button>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"modal-body\">\n                <div class=\"profile-hero\">\n                    <img id=\"ep-avatar\" src=\"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1535713875002-d1d0cf377fde?q=80&amp;w=150&amp;auto=format&amp;fit=crop\" alt=\"Avatar\" onerror=\"this.src='https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1535713875002-d1d0cf377fde?q=80&amp;w=150&amp;auto=format&amp;fit=crop'\">\n                    <h3 id=\"ep-name\">Employee Name</h3>\n                    <p id=\"ep-group\">Location</p>\n                </div>\n                <div class=\"profile-details-grid\">\n                    <div class=\"detail-box\"><label>Assigned Role</label><div id=\"ep-role\">N/A</div></div>\n                    <div class=\"detail-box\"><label>Location / Facility</label><div id=\"ep-location\">N/A</div></div>\n                    <div class=\"detail-box\"><label>Contact Number</label><div id=\"ep-phone\">N/A</div></div>\n                    <div class=\"detail-box\"><label>Email Address</label><div id=\"ep-email\">N/A</div></div>\n                    <div class=\"detail-box\"><label>Address</label><div id=\"ep-address\">N/A</div></div>\n                    <div class=\"detail-box\" style=\"grid-column: 1 / -1;\"><label>Biographical / Structural Notes</label><div id=\"ep-bio\" style=\"font-weight: normal; line-height: 1.5;\">N/A</div></div>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <div id=\"user-edit-modal\" class=\"modal-overlay\">\n        <div class=\"modal-content\" style=\"max-width: 550px;\">\n            <div class=\"modal-header\">\n                <h2>⚙️ Edit My Profile</h2>\n                <button class=\"modal-close\" onclick=\"closeModal('user-edit-modal')\">✕</button>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"modal-body\" style=\"padding: 24px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px;\">\n                <div class=\"input-group\">\n                    <label>Profile Picture</label>\n                    <div style=\"display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;\">\n                        <img id=\"ue-avatar-preview\" src=\"\" style=\"width: 60px; height: 60px; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover; border: 2px solid var(--primary);\">\n                        <input type=\"file\" id=\"ue-avatar-file\" accept=\"image/*\" onchange=\"openCropModal('ue-avatar-file', 'ue-avatar-base64', 'ue-avatar-preview')\" style=\"flex: 1;\">\n                        <input type=\"hidden\" id=\"ue-avatar-base64\">\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n                <div class=\"input-group\"><label>Email Address</label><input type=\"email\" id=\"ue-email\" placeholder=\"Your email address\"></div>\n                <div class=\"input-group\"><label>Phone Number</label><input type=\"text\" id=\"ue-phone\" placeholder=\"Your contact number\"></div>\n                <div class=\"input-group\"><label>Address</label><textarea id=\"ue-address\" placeholder=\"Your current residential address\" style=\"min-height: 60px;\"></textarea></div>\n                <hr style=\"border: 0; border-top: 1px dashed var(--card-border); margin: 8px 0;\">\n                <div class=\"input-group\"><label>Change Password (Optional)</label><input type=\"password\" id=\"ue-password\" placeholder=\"Leave blank to keep unchanged...\"></div>\n                <button class=\"btn-sync\" style=\"margin-top: 8px;\" onclick=\"saveUserProfile()\">Save Profile Changes</button>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- Base App Container -->\n    <div id=\"login-portal\">\n        <div class=\"login-card\">\n            <img src=\"data:image/png;base64,"
